selection_policy.official_anchor: Use the run that best balances undefeated or strongest match record with high score and low captures for the stored seed set. Do not blindly trust the harness auto-best file when it prefers score diff over capture quality.
selection_policy.latest_broader_sample: Keep the newest wider-seed benchmark summary for each tracked opponent so regression and volatility can be seen beyond the official anchor seed set.

notes: Promoted from the rollout-scoring refinement that values safe local pellet potential and realized score slightly more strongly inside MonteCarlo playouts.
Replaces the old NeuralNet anchor because it kept the 5-0 record, raised average score substantially, and still held captures to 0.4.
Promoted from the validated worktree change that stops hard-short-circuiting directly into post-capture escape.
Higher score and fewer captures than the prior 5-0 StaticHeuro anchor, so this is now the official score/capture reference.
Current headless official validation for the narrower near-danger rollout tweak on top of c03b29f.
This live candidate recovered to 5-0 and cut captures to 0.2, but it still stays below the official NeuralNet anchor because the official anchor keeps a materially higher average score.
Current headless official validation for the same narrower near-danger rollout tweak on top of c03b29f.
Record and score diff improved to 4-1, but the tweak still lost seed 105 and averaged 1.0 captures, so the official StaticHeuro anchor remains unchanged.
Latest broader sample for the current c03b29f near-danger rollout tweak after the sandbox harness repair.
Improved to 9-1 with 0.3 average captures; only seed 106 still lost, on score and captures.
Latest broader sample for the current c03b29f near-danger rollout tweak after the sandbox harness repair.
Improved to 9-1 with the same 0.4 average captures as the official StaticHeuro anchor; only seed 101 still lost, by score.
